job_application_applicant.subject: Application received: {{job_title}} — {{community}}
job_application_applicant.title: Application Submitted!
job_application_applicant.preview: Your application for {{job_title}} has been received
job_application_applicant.body: Your application for {{job_title}} has been received and is being reviewed.
job_application_applicant.next_steps: The hiring team will review your application and be in touch if you're shortlisted.

job_application_employer.subject: New application for: {{job_title}} — {{community}}
job_application_employer.title: New Job Application
job_application_employer.body: {{applicant_name}} has submitted an application for your vacancy: {{job_title}}.

group_removed.subject: You have been removed from {{group_name}} — {{community}}
group_removed.title: Group Membership Update
group_removed.body: Your membership in the group "{{group_name}}" on {{community}} has ended.
group_removed.suggestion: You can discover and join other groups in your community.

group_promoted.subject: You're now a {{role}} of {{group_name}} — {{community}}
group_promoted.title: Role Update
group_promoted.preview: Congratulations — you've been made a {{role}} of {{group_name}}
group_promoted.body: You have been promoted to {{role}} of the group "{{group_name}}" on {{community}}.
group_promoted.responsibilities: As {{role}}, you can help manage the group and support its members.
